common.tools_menu_description: Quickly jump into any tool without a hierarchy—everything is equally accessible.

home.hero_description: Boost your creative workflow with professional tools for text transformation, design assets, and growth indicators. Simple, fast, and free forever.
home.ecosystem_description: Everything you need to leave a mark on the digital landscape.
home.fancy_text_description: Transform your identity with aesthetic Unicode styles. Perfect for social bios and standout posts.
home.symbol_picker_description: Access a massive library of exclusive symbols and text faces.
home.bio_generator_description: AI-powered profile optimization to grow your audience.
home.growth_trends_description: Real-time analytics and predictive trends for modern creators.
home.slug_generator_description: Generate clean URL-friendly slugs from Vietnamese text with live preview.
home.feature_safe_description: All transformations happen on your device. We never store your content or track your data.
home.feature_speed_description: Native performance that just works. No loading screens, no delays, just pure productivity.
home.feature_free_description: Professional tools shouldn't cost a fortune. Access everything with no ads and no fees.

about.hero_description: Market Tools was born from a simple idea: professional utilities for content creators should be fast, free, and completely private.
about.value_privacy_description: We don't use cookies. We don't track your data. All transformations happen directly on your device. Your creativity is your business, not ours.
about.value_performance_description: Built with Next.js and optimized for speed. No bloat, no heavy libraries, just the performance you need to get things done.
about.value_unicode_description: We leverage universal Unicode characters to ensure your text looks perfect on every social platform, from Instagram to Twitter.
about.value_free_description: Market Tools is a passion project. No subscriptions, no ads, no paywalls. Our mission is to empower creators everywhere.
about.story_p1: In an era where every utility requires an account or bombards you with ads, we wanted to create something different. Market Tools is designed to be a utilitarian haven—a place where you can quickly transform your text, pick symbols, and optimize your presence without friction.
about.story_p2: Every line of code is written with simplicity and standard web practices in mind. We use the latest technologies like Shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS to maintain a clean, aesthetic, and accessible environment.

fancy_text.title: Fancy Text Decorator
fancy_text.description: Transform your ordinary text into extraordinary styles suitable for any social platform.
fancy_text.compatibility_description: All styles are optimized for Vietnamese diacritic rendering across social platforms.

slug_generator.title: Slug Generator
slug_generator.description: Create clean slugs from Vietnamese text with a live URL preview card.
slug_generator.input_title_placeholder: Enter a title or Vietnamese text
slug_generator.input_description_placeholder: Write a short description for the preview card
slug_generator.preview_description_default: A concise description will appear here to mimic a search result snippet.
slug_generator.preview_note: Slug removes Vietnamese diacritics and converts the text into a URL-friendly format.
slug_generator.hint: Slug output strips Vietnamese diacritics and converts the text into a URL-friendly format.
